title: Update agent-runner.md: recursive frontier + project checkpoint stopping rule
description:
Update skills/ticks/references/agent-runner.md so its continuation / two-tier-stopping-rule section reflects the SHIPPED recursive engine (design section 5). Add: the frontier ascends the project tree (epic to sibling to parent project); a project boundary STOPS on a checkpoint by default; the global autonomous-mode switch (next --autonomous / policy.autonomous_mode) overrides ALL project checkpoints; the per-project auto-continue convention (omit the checkpoint await on that project close-out). Note CompletedProjectsNeedingCloseout and next --autonomous as the mechanisms. Keep epic-level retro and learnings text unchanged (epic is still the retro altitude).

Match the vocabulary established by the rewritten SKILL.md (read it first). CRITICAL: verify every tk command against cmd/tk/cmd/*.go (learnings.md rule).

Files: skills/ticks/references/agent-runner.md.
acceptance_criteria: agent-runner.md continuation/stopping-rule section documents recursive frontier ascent (epic→sibling→parent container), project-boundary checkpoint default, the global autonomous-mode switch + per-project auto-continue convention; vocabulary matches the rewritten SKILL.md; epic retro/learnings text unchanged; tk commands verified against cmd/tk/cmd
